title: Update on Mossel Bay fires
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has said that crews from its fire, rescue and disaster management services are still monitoring two vegetation fires, one between Little Brak River and Hartenbos, and the other on some farming land next to the N2 near KwaNonqaba.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has said that crews from its fire, rescue and disaster management services are still monitoring two vegetation fires, one between Little Brak River and Hartenbos, and the other on some farming land next to the N2 near KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Due to windy and dry conditions, flare-ups continue to be reported at both sites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Little Brak/Hartenbos fire broke out near the railway line between these two areas on Saturday afternoon, 3 January.","html":"The Little Brak/Hartenbos fire broke out near the railway line between these two areas on Saturday afternoon, 3 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Monday afternoon, 5 January, a vegetation fire broke out on the farming land next to the N2. That fire was escalated to the Garden Route District Municipality’s fire services.","html":"On Monday afternoon, 5 January, a vegetation fire broke out on the farming land next to the N2. That fire was escalated to the Garden Route District Municipality’s fire services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No structures are currently in danger.","html":"No structures are currently in danger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The vegetation fire next to the N2. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality","html":"The vegetation fire next to the N2. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Garden Route District Municipality said a counter-burn is currently being implemented on the farming land to clear dense vegetation, which had caused multiple flare-ups today due to strong winds.","html":"The Garden Route District Municipality said a counter-burn is currently being implemented on the farming land to clear dense vegetation, which had caused multiple flare-ups today due to strong winds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Report any wildfires to the Garden Route District Municipality’s emergency call centre on 044 805 5071 or WhatsApp them to 081 709 5193.","html":"Report any wildfires to the Garden Route District Municipality’s emergency call centre on 044 805 5071 or WhatsApp them to 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read the latest here: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Island View, Vakansieplaas, Aalwyndal residents being evacuated","html":"Read the latest here: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Island View, Vakansieplaas, Aalwyndal residents being evacuated"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Little Brak vegetation fire: firefighting efforts continue","Little Brak vegetation fire extinguished"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
